type: use-case # ← do NOT change

businessValue: '' # ← why it matters / the payoff (optional)
solution: '' # ← the approach in one line (optional — green box)

# Metadata
publishedAt: 2026-01-01 # ← YYYY-MM-DD
# updatedAt: 2026-01-15      # ← OPTIONAL
difficulty: Intermediate # ← Beginner | Intermediate | Advanced (optional)
tags: [Service Cloud] # ← optional
featured: false # ← true = homepage
published: true # ← false = private
---
